title: Basic JavaScript Testing with Jest
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Testing with Jest. Focus on implementing Jest setup and configuration correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Testing with Jest
description: Create a function that uses Jest setup and configuration and Matchers (toBe, toEqual, toContain) together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Testing with Jest Project
description: Build a small application that applies Jest setup and configuration, Matchers (toBe, toEqual, toContain), Mocking (jest.fn, jest.mock) in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Testing with Jest
description: The following code has bugs related to Jest setup and configuration. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Testing with Jest
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Jest setup and configuration and Matchers (toBe, toEqual, toContain).
